summary:
Claim: The patient has chronic respiratory acidosis with renal compensation.  
Evidence: - pH of 7.12 indicates acidemia. - Elevated HCO₃⁻ (28 mmol/L) reflects renal compensation for chronic hypercapnia.  
Answer: C
